consensus.overall_description: A white crewneck t-shirt featuring a colorful graphic print of roses and abstract elements on the front.
consensus.stitching_details: Standard stitching visible on the collar and sleeve hem.

claude: large illustrative rose bouquet graphic emerging from dark clouds
multicolor stained-glass style fill within roses using deep purple, orange, pink, and gray tones
gray stems and leaves with line-art detailing
dark cloud base beneath the floral arrangement
gemini: The rose petals feature a colorful, abstract pattern.

values.gpt: A white crewneck t-shirt featuring a colorful graphic print of roses and abstract elements on the front.
values.claude: An off-white crewneck t-shirt featuring a large center-front graphic of stylized roses rising from dark clouds, rendered in a stained-glass-inspired multicolor palette of deep purple, orange, pink, and gray, with the SkyyRose SR monogram printed at the neckline.
values.gemini: A white short-sleeve crewneck t-shirt with a large, intricate embroidered patch on the chest. The patch shows two colorful roses growing out of a cloud, and a small monogram logo is printed on the upper back.

gemini: Large embroidered patch on the center chest depicting two multi-colored roses with thorny stems, emerging from a dark cloud.

values.gemini: Standard stitching visible on the collar and sleeve hem.
